channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: निंदक नियरे राखिए, ऑंगन कुटी छवाय । बिन पानी, साबुन बिना, निर्मल करे सुभाय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Keep your critics close. Without water or soap, they cleanse your character.

Translation: Keep critics close. They clean your nature without soap or water.
item.guid: निंदक नियरे राखिए, ऑंगन कुटी छवाय । बिन पानी, साबुन बिना, निर्मल करे सुभाय ॥493276

item.title: ज्यों नैनों में पुतली, त्यों मालिक घट माहिं । मूरख लोग न जानहीं, बाहर ढूँढन जाहिं ॥
item.description:
Meaning: As the pupil is in the eye, the Lord is within the body. Fools know it not and search outside.

Translation: As the pupil is in the eye, God is within. Fools seek Him outside.
item.guid: ज्यों नैनों में पुतली, त्यों मालिक घट माहिं । मूरख लोग न जानहीं, बाहर ढूँढन जाहिं ॥493277

item.title: प्रेम पियाला जो पिये, शीश दक्षिणा देय । लोभी शीश न दे सके, नाम प्रेम का लेय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: He who drinks the cup of love gives his head as a gift. The greedy cannot give their head but still speak of love.

Translation: He who drinks love's cup gives his life. The greedy cannot, yet they speak of love.
item.guid: प्रेम पियाला जो पिये, शीश दक्षिणा देय । लोभी शीश न दे सके, नाम प्रेम का लेय ॥493278
